violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. > Discovered raw beef steak tips in the three door prep station on the cook line uncovered next to vegetables and cheeses. Noticed blood dripping towards the cheeses.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. > Disposed of cut peaches and onions from mid January in upright refrigerator. Disposed of house made sauce for chicken from December and mid January.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. > Cloth protecting dry storage area at coffee station is not smooth, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Shelving in basement utilizing cardboard as shelf liners. Some shelving in basement is raw wood material that needs sealed/painted over.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Cleaning, sanitizing or drying agents were not adequately stored separate from poisonous, toxic materials or pesticides. > Observed cleaning detergent and sanitizer stored next to pesticide underneath sink counter near the prep line. Moved pesticide to proper location with staff.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
